1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year flood zones intersecting Drammen municipality

3.description: get buildings intersecting Drammen municipality and 200-year flood zones

4.description: get quick-clay hazard zones intersecting Drammen municipality

5.description: transform buildings to metric CRS for distance calculation

6.description: transform quick-clay zones to metric CRS for distance calculation

7.description: calculate distance from each building to nearest quick-clay hazard zone

8.description: sort buildings by distance to quick-clay hazard zone ascending

replan_trigger.error: Step 2 returned 0 rows before the plan was complete. Treat this as an empty intermediate result and revise the plan, filter, join, table choice, or predicate.
